endpoints.name: GET /v1/ESimProfiles
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of eSIM Profiles.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/ESimProfiles
endpoints.description: Order an eSIM Profile.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/ESimProfiles/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch an eSIM Profile.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Fleets
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of Fleets from your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Fleets
endpoints.description: Create a Fleet
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Fleets/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a Fleet instance from your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/Fleets/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Updates the given properties of a Super SIM Fleet instance from your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/IpCommands
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of IP Commands from your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/IpCommands
endpoints.description: Send an IP Command to a Super SIM.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/IpCommands/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch IP Command instance from your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/NetworkAccessProfiles
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of Network Access Profiles from your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/NetworkAccessProfiles
endpoints.description: Create a new Network Access Profile
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/NetworkAccessProfiles/{NetworkAccessProfileSid}/Networks
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of Network Access Profile resource's Network resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{NETWORKACCESSPROFILESID}} with a real networkaccessprofilesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/NetworkAccessProfiles/{NetworkAccessProfileSid}/Networks
endpoints.description: Add a Network resource to the Network Access Profile resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{NETWORKACCESSPROFILESID}} with a real networkaccessprofilesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/NetworkAccessProfiles/{NetworkAccessProfileSid}/Networks/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a Network Access Profile resource's Network resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{NETWORKACCESSPROFILESID}} with a real networkaccessprofilesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/NetworkAccessProfiles/{NetworkAccessProfileSid}/Networks/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Remove a Network resource from the Network Access Profile resource's.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{NETWORKACCESSPROFILESID}} with a real networkaccessprofilesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/NetworkAccessProfiles/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a Network Access Profile instance from your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/NetworkAccessProfiles/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Updates the given properties of a Network Access Profile in your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Networks
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of Network resources.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/Networks/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a Network resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.
